name: caveman-talk
description: Caveman compression for Codex — terse responses and input compression via any OpenAI-compatible API

interface.shortDescription: Terse caveman responses. Cut fluff. Keep technical substance.
interface.longDescription: Combines two forms of caveman compression: a skill that makes the agent respond in terse caveman-speak (lite/full/ultra intensity), and CLI tools that compress/decompress text via any OpenAI-compatible API endpoint.
defaultPrompt: Use caveman mode. Cut filler. Keep technical accuracy.
